# 30-Pillar Holistic Project Audit Template

**Audience:** Phenotype bloc (AgilePlus + thegent + Tracely + Tracera + satellite repos, ~76 crates)
**Methodology:** File-and-line citations, SOTA 2026 reference, status: ✓/△/✗
**Generated by:** tick28-holistic-audit (manager: team-lead, 20 forge teammates)
**Reference:** `repos/AUDIT_BLOC_VS_2026_SOTA.md` (2026-06-15), `repos/FLEET_100TASK_DAG.md`

## Pillars

Each pillar gets:
- **Scope** (1 sentence)
- **What SOTA 2026 looks like** (citations/repos)
- **Phenotype bloc state** (file:line + status ✓/△/✗)
- **Gap** (if △ or ✗, concrete path to fix)
- **Effort** (S/M/L)

| # | Pillar | Domain | Owner |
|---|---|---|---|
| L0 | Architecture foundations | AX | forge-001 |
| L1 | Module structure & boundaries | AX | forge-001 |
| L2 | API surface & contract | AX | forge-002 |
| L3 | Data model & state management | AX | forge-002 |
| L4 | Async/concurrency design | AX | forge-003 |
| L5 | Observability (logs/metrics/traces) | perf+ops | forge-003 |
| L6 | Performance budgets & profiling | perf | forge-004 |
| L7 | Concurrency safety & races | quality | forge-004 |
| L8 | Memory & allocation | perf | forge-005 |
| L9 | Build & release pipeline | DX+ops | forge-005 |
| L10 | CI/CD hygiene (SHA-pins, ubuntu) | DX | forge-006 |
| L11 | Test coverage & quality gates | quality | forge-006 |
| L12 | Documentation & SSOT | DX | forge-007 |
| L13 | Onboarding & contributor DX | DX | forge-007 |
| L14 | Error handling & user feedback | UX | forge-008 |
| L15 | CLI/UX & ergonomics | UX | forge-008 |
| L16 | Internationalization (i18n/l10n) | UX | forge-009 |
| L17 | Accessibility (a11y) | UX | forge-009 |
| L18 | Secret management | security | forge-010 |
| L19 | Supply-chain security (SBOM/CVE) | security | forge-010 |
| L20 | Threat model & attack surface | security | forge-011 |
| L21 | AuthN/AuthZ (OAuth/SAML/JWT) | security | forge-011 |
| L22 | Cryptography & key management | security | forge-012 |
| L23 | Audit log & compliance | security+ops | forge-012 |
| L24 | Multi-tenant isolation & data privacy | security | forge-013 |
| L25 | Resource limits & rate limits | perf+security | forge-013 |
| L26 | Resilience (retries/backoff/circuit) | quality | forge-014 |
| L27 | Observability of failure modes | quality | forge-015 |
| L28 | Dependency hygiene & CVEs | security+DX | forge-016 |
| L29 | Repository governance (license/CI/license-check/CODEOWNERS) | DX+quality | forge-017 |

Owners forge-018..020 reserved for cross-cutting synthesis (final report writer, dupe-check, presenter).

## Output format per pillar

```markdown
# L{N} — {Pillar name}

## Scope
...

## SOTA 2026
...

## Phenotype state
- agileplus-X/src/Y.rs:123-145 — status ✓
- thegent/crates/X/src/main.rs:80-95 — status △ (gap: ...)
- Tracely/core/src/Z.rs:200-260 — status ✗ (gap: ...)

## Gaps
1. **path/to/file.rs:line** — what's wrong — effort: S/M/L
2. ...

## Recommendations
1. ...
```
